Aggregated execute batches: completed 6/6.
Batch 1: T1 audit completed. `_ensure_verification_task(payload: dict, state: dict) -> None` is called only from `_write_finalize_artifacts(plan_dir: Path, payload: dict[str, Any], state: PlanState) -> str`, so test-baseline data does not flow in today and will need explicit wiring at that call site or by enriching `payload` before finalize write. The exact `all tests pass` string is not in `prompts/execute.py`; the live scope-creep text is in `handlers.py`: `If any test fails, read the error, fix the code, and re-run until all tests pass.` Default review uses Codex with `--full-auto`, so it can run commands; Claude review does not get execute-style permission bypass. Finalize artifacts live under `.megaplan/plans/<plan_name>/` and finalize currently writes `finalize.json`, `finalize_snapshot.json`, and `final.md` there. There is no repo-local `config.py`; runtime config is global JSON at `~/.config/megaplan/config.json` or `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/megaplan/config.json`, loaded by `_core.io.load_config()` with defaults from `types.DEFAULTS`. Existing test modules under `tests/` are `test_checks.py`, `test_config.py`, `test_core.py`, `test_evaluation.py`, `test_handle_review_robustness.py`, `test_io_git_patch.py`, `test_loop.py`, `test_megaplan.py`, `test_parallel_critique.py`, `test_parallel_review.py`, `test_prompts.py`, `test_quality.py`, `test_review_checks.py`, `test_review_mechanical.py`, `test_schemas.py`, `test_swe_bench.py`, `test_tiny_robustness.py`, and `test_workers.py`.

task_updates.executor_notes: Audited the live finalize and verification flow and confirmed the main scope-creep mechanism is handler-injected verification text. `_ensure_verification_task(payload: dict, state: dict) -> None` is called only from `_write_finalize_artifacts(plan_dir, payload, state)`, so baseline data will need explicit wiring there; `prompts/execute.py` does not contain a literal `all tests pass` string, while `handlers.py` does. I also verified that default Codex review runs with `--full-auto`, finalize artifacts are written directly under `.megaplan/plans/<plan_name>/`, `validate_execution_evidence()` currently audits git/evidence quality rather than test outcomes, and config today comes from global JSON config plus `types.DEFAULTS`, with no finalize-specific settings yet.

I verified the target source locations before editing. The only real megaplan codebase is `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/megaplan/megaplan`, and both that directory and `/Users/peteromalley/.claude/skills/megaplan` are read-only from this sandbox, so `_capture_test_baseline()` could not be added, `schemas.py` could not be updated, and no trustworthy test verification was possible. Manual follow-up is to rerun batch 2 in a session with write access to the actual megaplan repo or provide a writable clone under the current workspace.
